title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week brought major improvements to OpsPal's automation capabilities with the launch of a new policy engine that lets you set up automated workflows for your revenue processes. We also expanded our skill catalog to 683 skills across 25 categories and fixed critical issues that were preventing Salesforce deployments and HubSpot integrations from working properly.

entries.headline: Enhanced desktop app compatibility across different operating systems
details: The desktop application now works more reliably across Windows, Mac, and Linux systems

entries.headline: Added automated policy engine for work lifecycle management
details: You can now set up automated rules that trigger actions based on specific conditions in your revenue processes

entries.headline: Resolved startup errors that prevented OpsPal from launching
Restored automatic work tracking and context capture
details: OpsPal now properly tracks your work progress and captures context for better automation

entries.headline: Added promote skills command for capability management
Expanded skill catalog to 683 skills across 25 categories
details: OpsPal can now handle a much wider range of revenue operations tasks with improved automation capabilities

entries.headline: Enhanced data import reliability and workspace authentication
details: Data imports are now more reliable and workspace connections are more stable

entries.headline: Salesforce deployments now recover automatically from errors
details: Failed Salesforce deployments can now retry and recover without manual intervention

entries.headline: Restored runbook functionality and cleaned up background processes
Standardized plugin names for consistent display
Improved text formatting in automated communications
Restored missing historical data from weeks 12 and 13
Updated internal references to resolve plugin conflicts
details: Fixed issues where plugins couldn't find each other, improving overall system stability

entries.headline: Updates now include latest marketplace features automatically
Improved Salesforce deployment validation and error handling
details: Better detection of Salesforce configuration issues and more reliable deployment processes

entries.headline: Enhanced Salesforce deployment workflow management
details: Multi-step Salesforce deployments now run more smoothly with better coordination

entries.headline: Restored HubSpot integration functionality
details: Fixed a critical issue that was preventing all HubSpot automations from working
